name: session-relay
description: Cross-session, cross-project agent message bus for Claude Code. A SessionStart hook auto-registers each session and drains its inbox; an MCP server (bus) exposes whoami/register/roster/send/inbox over a shared on-disk store keyed by session id; and a relay CLI wakes an idle target via headless `claude -p --resume` from its project directory. Claude Code only (uses the claude CLI + a plugin MCP server).
